evals.prompt: I registered a Main Menu button in my Workfront extension. It registers (getItems is called) but the button never shows up. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Points to the id trap: extensionId must be non-empty in Constants.js and id: extensionId must be kept inside methods, or the item registers but silently never renders.

assertions.description: Identifies the empty/misplaced extensionId as the cause.
Explains id must be kept inside methods.

evals.prompt: Add a left-panel item to my Workfront extension that shows only on Project pages.
evals.expected_output: Uses secondaryNav with a per-object-type key (PROJECT) inside ExtensionRegistration, with a url that maps to an App.js route.

assertions.description: Scopes it to the Project object type.

evals.prompt: How do I read the current user and IMS token in my Workfront SPA and pass them to a Runtime action?
evals.expected_output: Reads sharedContext.get('auth') for imsToken and imsOrgID (capital ID) and passes them into actionWebInvoke; never fetches Workfront directly from the SPA.

assertions.description: Passes values to the action via actionWebInvoke.

evals.prompt: Embed my Workfront app as a widget inside a custom form field, with a fixed height.
evals.expected_output: Uses the widgets extension point in ExtensionRegistration with a dimensions object (height/width).
